settings.title: Save 25%
settings.body: Automatic discount on every subscription order — no codes needed.

settings.title: Roasted Fresh
settings.body: Roasted to order and shipped within 48 hours of your delivery date.

settings.title: Flexible Cadence
settings.body: Monthly delivery — pause, skip, or cancel anytime. No lock-in.

settings.heading: Subscribe & Save 25%
settings.body: Fresh specialty coffee, roasted to order and delivered on your schedule. Subscribe to any coffee and save 25% on every bag.

settings.title: 1. Choose your coffee
settings.text: Browse our single-origin catalog. Every coffee includes tasting notes, origin details, and brew recommendations so you can pick with confidence.

settings.title: 2. Select Subscribe & Save
settings.text: On any product page, toggle from One-time to Subscribe. You'll lock in 25% off every order, automatically.

settings.title: 3. We roast to order
settings.text: Your coffee is roasted the day it ships and packed within 48 hours of your delivery date. It arrives at peak freshness, every time.

settings.title: 4. Manage anytime
settings.text: Swap coffees, skip a shipment, or pause — all from your subscriber portal. No lock-in, no phone calls.

settings.heading: Can I cancel anytime?
settings.row_content: Yes. No contracts, no cancellation fees. Log in to your subscriber portal, find your active subscription, and cancel with one click. Any order already processed for that cycle will still ship.

settings.heading: Can I swap my coffee?
settings.row_content: Absolutely. Log in to your subscriber portal between shipments and swap to any coffee in our catalog. The change takes effect on your next order.

settings.heading: What if I need to skip a delivery?
settings.row_content: Log in to your subscriber portal before your next processing date and skip the shipment. Your subscription resumes automatically the following month — nothing else changes.

settings.heading: How do I know when my coffee was roasted?
settings.row_content: Every bag ships with a roast date on the label. We roast to order, so your bag was roasted within 48 hours of shipping. For subscriptions, we time the roast date to land right as your previous bag runs out.

settings.heading: Can I subscribe to more than one coffee?
settings.row_content: Yes — each coffee is its own independent subscription with its own cadence and bag size. Subscribe to as many as you like.
